claims: The public-shell snapshot lane asserts compiler-emitted segment-plan metadata contracts for the admin-style shell, nested parent, and nested partial cases.
The snapshot manifest records segment_plan_metadata=true and segment_plan_contracts_passed=true while preserving 11 generated-shape cases.
Focused admin-style and nested segment behavior checks still pass.
non_claims: This does not prove WordPress behavior parity beyond the focused oracle/candidate runners.
This does not claim generated ownership of existing WordPress mixed PHP/HTML files.
This does not claim broad theme, admin, feed, or block template ownership.
This does not claim arbitrary Haxe expression lowering into PHP caller scope.
This does not claim whole-file ownership for any WordPress file.
